name: construction contractors managing 5-10 projects simultaneously tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5-10 projects simultaneously, inconsistent equipment maintenance causes unexpected downtime. We provide a scheduling system instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inconsistent equipment maintenance schedules lead to unexpected downtime.
features: simple dashboard for tracking equipment status
